result:
**Goal: Add a Fourier Epicycle Drawing simulation mode.**

Rotating circles (epicycles) trace complex shapes in real-time, demonstrating how any closed curve can be decomposed into a sum of circular motions via the Discrete Fourier Transform. The user draws a path with the cursor, then watches a chain of spinning circles reconstruct it — larger circles capture the broad shape, smaller ones add fine detail. Visually mesmerizing, mathematically elegant, and unlike any of the existing 79 modes.

Shall I implement it?
